gpu: AMD Radeon RX Vega (radeonsi, vega10, LLVM 17.0.6, DRM 3.57, 6.8.9-200.fc39.x86_64)
notes:
I tried Proton 8, 9, and Experimental, each with and without the command options. The menu all worked fine, but any time I tried to join a match I would get `anti-cheat integrity check failed (0x2200)`. I've seen that error a few times on other games using Easy, and it seems like it's something the devs have to fix.


There isn't any offline play or tutorial, so I couldn't do any playing. This is from the playtest, btw.
